title: Ukrainian Apple Gratin
description: A twist on the classic gratin, incorporating hearty Ukrainian flavors and a hint of citrus.

ingredients.name: Citrusy Cheese
ingredients.notes: shredded (such as cheddar or parmesan with lemon zest)

instructions: In a large bowl, combine grated carrots, sliced potatoes, and thinly sliced onion. Drizzle with butter and mix until potatoes are evenly coated.
In a separate bowl, mix together breadcrumbs and citrusy cheese.
In a greased 9x13-inch baking dish, create a layer of potatoes, followed by a layer of apples.
Repeat the potato and apple layers, finishing with a layer of potatoes on top.
Sprinkle the breadcrumb-cheese mixture evenly over the top layer of potatoes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Bake in preheated oven for 45 minutes, or until top is golden brown and potatoes are tender.
Serve warm, garnished with additional citrusy cheese if desired.
